_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Perform asset management and maintain inventory of control system devices and components through physical inspection or logical scans.
reference_document_element_description: Maintain the enterprise AI system inventory, ensuring all AI applications are registered, risk-tiered, owned, and subject to appropriate review and monitoring.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AG domain. AG-T-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-T-002 (AG, cosine: 0.499), AI-T-021 (AI, cosine: 0.494).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.0/10 (raw 0.605). Shared vocabulary: [inventory, maintain, system]. DCWF-only terms [asset, components, control, devices, inspection, logical] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, applications, appropriate, ensuring, enterprise, monitoring] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.878 (P=0.885, R=0.872). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DCWF element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.2%). "Perform asset management and maintain inventory of control system devices and co" and "Maintain the enterprise AI system inventory, ensuring all AI applications are re" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.529 < STS 0.605 (gap -0.076). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [asset, components, control] and [ai, applications, appropriate] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.1%. Shared tokens: [inventory, maintain, system]. DCWF-only: [asset, components, control, devices, inspection, logical]. WIDAI-only: [ai, applications, appropriate, ensuring, enterprise, monitoring].
